description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on workflow dispatch, push to master or v0.23.x branches, and pull requests to those branches, excluding certain paths. The workflow should have read permission to repository contents. It should run a single ubuntu-22.04 job that checks out the code, caches ccache, installs dependencies including meson and ninja-build, installs the Android SDK, and then builds the project for Android using a Python script and Gradle.
